title: kohleria peruviana
intro: Kohleria peruviana, also known as the 'Peruvian Slipper Orchid', is a type of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Kohleria peruviana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
